backstory.original: A young Eladrin woman, raised to be the Queen of Koshmarr, what was meant to be an idyllic life took a dark turn on the night of her wedding. Pulled into the machinations of greater powers, she found herself in Mordent, now one of the many wandering ghosts. A person of great interest both to Azalin Rex and Strahd, she sought to negotiate her freedom from these dread domains. Her longtime companions and their newfound friends wanted the same and imbued her soul into Desmond's sword. As they traveled in search of returning her soul to her body, Voronika took matters into her own hands and used the crown of the Raven Queen to defeat Zybilna and cause the fall of Prismeer. This action drew the mists to Voronika and soon she discovered herself a new darklord in her domain of Koshmarr.
backstory.display: 作为一名以科什马尔皇后为目标受教养长大的年轻雅灵女性，她原本应该过着诗情画意的生活，但在婚礼当晚，一切都发生了黑暗的转折。她被更为强大的力量卷入阴谋之中，并发现自己来到了莫登特，已变成无数的游荡鬼魂之一。作为亚扎林·雷克斯和斯特拉德都非常感兴趣的人，她曾试图通过谈判来离开这些恐惧领域。她的老朋友和她们新结识的朋友也有着同样的想法，并将她的灵魂注入了戴斯蒙德的剑中。在寻找灵魂回归身体之法的旅程中，沃罗妮卡逐渐掌控局势，并利用渡鸦女王的王冠击败了齐比尔娜，导致普利斯米尔陨落。这样的动静使迷雾向沃罗妮卡靠拢。不久之后，她发现自己成为了故乡科什马尔领域中新的黑暗领主。

description.original: Voronika creates a flame in her hand which she fires at a random enemy.
description.display: 沃罗妮卡在手中制造一团火焰，并向一名随机敌人发射。

longDescription.original: Voronika creates a flame in her hand which she fires at a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡在手中制造一团火焰，并向一名随机敌人发射。

description.original: Voronika magically damages and pushes back all enemies. Survivors do reduced damage for 30 seconds.
description.display: 沃罗妮卡运用魔法伤害并击退所有敌人。幸存者造成的伤害降低 30 秒。

longDescription.original: Voronika moves in front of the party, magically damaging and pushing back all enemies. Any surviving enemies do reduced damage for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡在队伍前方移动，运用魔法伤害并击退所有敌人。任何幸存的敌人造成的伤害降低 30 秒。

description.original: Voronika increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her.
description.display: 沃罗妮卡会提高她前列勇士的伤害。

description.original: Voronika has three quests to complete, she gets much stronger after she completes them.
description.display: 沃罗妮卡需要完成三个任务，完成后会变得更加强大。

description.desc: After being killed on her wedding night, $(source_hero) became a ghost. $(source_hero) continues to attack and can be attacked like normal.
在新婚之夜被杀后，$(source_hero)变成了一个幽灵。$(source_hero)继续攻击，可以像普通情况一样受到攻击。

Voronika claims the BUD-setting Champion as her Puppet. The damage of her chosen Puppet is increased by $amount%. Voronika only changes her Puppet if a different Champion is the BUD-setting Champion for more than $puppet_change_time seconds in a row. Voronika's Puppet gains the Black Dice Society affiliation.
沃罗妮卡将基础杀招伤害设置勇士变成自己的傀儡。她所选择的傀儡造成的伤害提高 $amount%。只有当另一位勇士成为基础杀招伤害设置勇士连续超过 $puppet_change_time  秒时，沃罗妮卡才会更换她的傀儡。沃罗妮卡的傀儡成为黑骰子协会从属组织成员。

conditions.desc: Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in one column in front of her by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Voronika's key allies are members of the Black Dice Society and Evil Champions. The effect of this ability is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each key ally in the formation. This stacks additively until Voronika completes her Search for the Crown, when it changes to stack multiplicatively.

Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in one column in front of her by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Voronika's key allies are members of the Black Dice Society and Champions who have a Favored Foe. The effect of this ability is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each key ally in the formation. This stacks additively until Voronika completes her Search for the Crown, when it changes to stack multiplicatively.

Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in one column in front of her by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Voronika's key allies are members of the Black Dice Society and Champions who have the Debuff role. The effect of this ability is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each key ally in the formation. This stacks additively until Voronika completes her Search for the Crown, when it changes to stack multiplicatively.

Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in one column in front of her by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Voronika's key allies are members of the Black Dice Society. The effect of this ability is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each key ally in the formation. This stacks additively until Voronika completes her Search for the Crown, when it changes to stack multiplicatively.
沃罗妮卡会令她前面一列的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。沃罗妮卡的关键盟友是黑骰子协会成员和邪恶阵营勇士。阵型中每有一位关键盟友，则此技能的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。以加算方式堆叠，直到沃罗妮卡完成她对王冠的搜寻，然后改为以乘算方式堆叠。
沃罗妮卡会令她前面一列的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。沃罗妮卡的关键盟友是黑骰子协会成员和有偏好对手的勇士。阵型中每有一位关键盟友，则此技能的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。以加算方式堆叠，直到沃罗妮卡完成她对王冠的搜寻，然后改为以乘算方式堆叠。
沃罗妮卡会令她前面一列的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。沃罗妮卡的关键盟友是黑骰子协会成员和有减益角色的勇士。阵型中每有一位关键盟友，则此技能的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。以加算方式堆叠，直到沃罗妮卡完成她对王冠的搜寻，然后改为以乘算方式堆叠。
沃罗妮卡会令她前面一列的所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。沃罗妮卡的关键盟友是黑骰子协会成员。阵型中每有一位关键盟友，则此技能的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。以加算方式堆叠，直到沃罗妮卡完成她对王冠的搜寻，然后改为以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in the column in front of her.
tipText.display: 沃罗妮卡会提高她前列所有勇士的伤害。

description.pre: Voronika's search for the Crown of Raven Queen requires her to complete 3 goals. When Voronika completes all 3 goals, she acquires the crown, transforms into her Darklord Form, unlocks her ultimate attack, and improves her base attack.
为寻找渡鸦女王的王冠，沃罗妮卡需要完成 3 个目标。当沃罗妮卡完成所有 3 个目标后，她将获得王冠，转化为黑暗领主形态，解锁杀招攻击并提高基本攻击。

tipText.original: Voronika has three quests to complete, and she becomes much stronger when they are complete.
tipText.display: 沃罗妮卡需要完成三个任务，完成后会变得更加强大。

description.desc: For the third Search for the Crown goal, Calculating Guidance's key allies must defeat 2,500 enemies. The key allies for Calculating Guidance now also include Champions who have the Evil alignment.
为完成“寻找王冠”的第三个目标，“计算引导”的关键盟友必须击败 2500 名敌人。“计算引导”的关键盟友现在包括邪恶阵营的勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika surrounds herself with powerful evil Champions to defeat her foes.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡与强大的邪恶阵营勇士为伴，共同击败敌人。

description.desc: For the third Search for the Crown goal, you must defeat 500 enemies who are the Favored Foe of any Champion in the formation. The key allies for Calculating Guidance now also include Champions who have a Favored Foe.
为完成“寻找王冠”的第三个目标，你必须击败 500 名敌人，这些敌人必须是阵型中的任何一名勇士的偏好对手。“计算引导”的关键盟友现在包括有偏好对手的勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika allies with powerful hunters to defeat favored foes.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡与强大的猎人联手，击败偏好对手。

description.desc: For the third Search for the Crown goal, you must apply 1750 Debuffs to enemies. The key allies for Calculating Guidance now also include Champions who have the Debuff role.
为完成“寻找王冠”的第三个目标，你必须给敌人施加 1750 项减益。“计算引导”的关键盟友现在包括有减益角色的勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika uses Champions that sap the power of her foes to accomplish her quests.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡利用削弱敌人力量的勇士，完成自己的任务。

conditions.desc: The effect of Puppet Master is increased by $(amount___2)%. This value multiplicatively decreases by $(reduction_amount_with_feat___2)% one minute after the adventure starts and decreases by another $(reduction_amount_with_feat___2)% for every minute after that, but doesn't decrease after Voronika has completed her Search for the Crown.

The effect of Puppet Master is increased by $(amount___2)%. This value multiplicatively decreases by $(reduction_amount___2)% five minutes after the adventure starts and decreases by another $(reduction_amount___2)% for every minute after that, but doesn't decrease after Voronika has completed her Search for the Crown.
“木偶大师”的效果提高 $(amount___2)%。该数值会在冒险开始一分钟后以乘算方式减少 $(reduction_amount_with_feat___2)%，之后每分钟再减少 $(reduction_amount_with_feat___2)%，但沃罗妮卡完成她的“寻找王冠”任务后，该数值将不再减少。
“木偶大师”的效果提高 $(amount___2)%。该数值会在冒险开始五分钟后以乘算方式减少 $(reduction_amount___2)%，之后每分钟再减少 $(reduction_amount___2)%，但沃罗妮卡完成她的“寻找王冠”任务后，该数值将不再减少。

description.desc: Voronika increases the effect of Calculating Guidance by $(not_buffed amount)% for each use of an Ultimate while she is in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. Caps at $max_stacks stacks. These stacks persist until reset.
沃罗妮卡在阵型中时，每次使用杀招都会使计算引导的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。堆叠上限为 $max_stacks 层。堆叠持续到重置。
Voronika's Puppet additionally casts an explosive magic missile at a random target after each attack which deals $amount% of their normal damage to all enemies in a small area.
沃罗妮卡的傀儡在每次攻击后还会向一个随机目标发射一枚爆炸魔法飞弹，对小范围内的所有敌人造成其正常伤害的 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika's puppet gains a Magic element to their attack for some explosive results.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡获得魔法元素攻击，带来爆炸性效果。

description.desc: Voronika's Puppet has all of their incoming positional damage effects increased by $amount%, and their basic attack now knocks back any enemies it hits a short distance.
沃罗妮卡的傀儡受到的所有位置伤害效果提高 $amount%，并且其基本攻击现在会将击中的敌人击退一小段距离。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika's puppet gains more power from those supporting them and drives enemies back.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡从支持者那里获得更多力量，击退敌人。

description.desc: Voronika's Puppet attacks $(seconds_plural amount) faster and their damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Champion adjacent to them, stacking multiplicatively.
沃罗妮卡的傀儡攻击速度提高 $(seconds_plural amount)，并且每有一个相邻的勇士，其造成的伤害就会提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Voronika's puppet attacks faster and deals more damage while surrounded by allies.
specializationDescription.display: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡在盟友的包围下攻击更快，伤害更高。

description.original: If you think there is anything I wouldn't do for Koshmarr, reconsider.
description.display: 如果你认为我会对科什马尔有所保留，再仔细想想吧。

description.original: I will lead Koshmarr to greatness. I must.
description.display: 我将带领科什马尔走向伟大。我必须做到。

description.original: Perhaps you need a little...encouragement.
description.display: 也许你需要一点......激励

description.original: What do you dream of at night that truly scares you?
description.display: 你晚上梦到什么会让你真正害怕？

description.original: My vision for the future includes you -- specifically, you obeying me.
description.display: 我的未来愿景中包含你们--具体来说，就是你们服从我。

description.original: Follow me, and you always have a home in Koshmarr.
description.display: 跟我来，你在科什马尔永远有一个家。

description.original: I've taken a personal interest in your success.
description.display: 我个人对你的成功很感兴趣。

description.original: Aren't you a clever one?
description.display: 你可真聪明？

description.original: My reach extends far beyond my domain's boundaries.
description.display: 我的能力范围远超我的领域界限。

effects.description: Changes Calculating Guidance to target the next two columns.

description.original: I have many plans for this.
description.display: 我对此有很多计划。

description.original: This isn't even my final power level.
description.display: 这根本不是我的最高力量等级。

description.original: Time and distance work differently in dreams.
description.display: 在梦里，时间和距离都变得不一样。

description.original: Do as I say - you'll live longer.
description.display: 照我说的做 - 这样你就能活得久一些。

description.original: If you do not feel like running, I will give you something to run from.
description.display: 如果你不想跑，我就给你一个让你不得不跑的理由。

description.original: Nothing is left to chance - I control everything in Koshmarr.
description.display: 没什么是偶然的——我掌控着科什马尔里的一切。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Speed Run by $amount%, increases the reduction amount to 20%, and the effect amount starts reducing at 1 minute.

description.original: You have strings, and now you're mine.
description.display: 你身上扯着线，现在你是我的了。

description.original: The cute part is that you think you aren't already my puppet.
description.display: 有意思的是，你居然以为自己还不是我的傀儡。

description.original: You are welcome in Koshmarr. For now.
description.display: 科什马尔很欢迎你。至少暂时如此。

effects.description: Adds Elves to Calculating Guidance's key allies.

name.display: 枯萎者德鲁伊沃罗妮卡
巴洛维亚拜访者沃罗妮卡

description.original: Van Richten may be a fearsome hunter, but he's also a kindly soul.
description.display: 范·里希顿也许是个可怕的猎人，但他也是个善良的灵魂。

description.original: Ah, for the time to sip tea with an old friend!
description.display: 啊，是时候和一位老朋友喝茶了！

name.original: The Courtesy of a Greater Host

description.original: Drink, Strahd. I already know why you're here.
description.display: 喝吧，斯特拉德。我已经知道你为什么来这里了。

description.original: Dear Azalin, this was never meant to be yours.
description.display: 亲爱的亚扎林，这本不该是你的。

description.original: Desmond and I have known each other since we were children.
description.display: 戴斯蒙德和我从小就认识了。

description.original: Marriage is an alliance of goals. But love is a splendid garden.
description.display: 婚姻是目标的联合。但爱情是一座美丽的花园。

description.original: When Desmond fled the crown, he fled me as well. Securing Koshmarr is up to me.
description.display: 戴斯蒙德逃离王室的时候，他也逃离了我。保护科什马尔的职责落到我的头上。

description.original: I love him too well to let him be a problem. A little wolfsbane keeps the beast at bay.
description.display: 我太爱他了，不会让他成为问题。一点点狼毒花就可以阻挡兽类。

description.original: This wedding cements so many years of planning.
description.display: 这场婚礼凝聚了多年的计划。

description.original: After I wed Armand, I will be Queen of Koshmarr.
description.display: 嫁给阿曼德之后，我将成为科什马尔的皇后。

description.original: Death is only an obstacle to be defeated when you are as determined as I am.
description.display: 当你和我一样坚定不移的时候，死亡只是一个需要克服的障碍。

description.original: Koshmarr will be secure under my rule. Forever.
description.display: 在我的统治下，科什马尔将安全无虞。永不改变。

description.original: One day, this will be mine.
description.display: 总有一天，它将属于我。

description.original: I'll hardly have time to sit down, as much as I do around here.
description.display: 需要做的事情太多，我几乎没有时间坐下来。

description.original: I will take Koshmarr in hand and make it what it's truly meant to be.
description.display: 我将掌控科什马尔，并让它焕发真正的光彩。

description.original: I am Koshmarr.
description.display: 我就是科什马尔。

description.original: Wolfsbane in large doses causes instantaneous death.
description.display: 大剂量的狼毒花可以瞬间致死。

description.original: Do you feel your fingers tingling? These delicate flowers are more than they seem.
description.display: 你觉得手指刺痛吗？这些娇嫩的花可比看起来要厉害。

description.original: Every part of the deadly nightshade brims with poison.
description.display: 这种致命的茄属植物每一部分都充满剧毒。

description.original: Such lovely blooms, such bitter poison.
description.display: 花朵如此可爱，毒性如此强烈。

description.original: This lovely rose is the symbol of our land.
description.display: 这朵漂亮的玫瑰是我们领地的象征。

description.original: The fresh rose is delicate, but also thorny.
description.display: 新鲜的玫瑰非常娇艳，但也有刺。

description.original: Sometimes you must prune away what is weak.
description.display: 有时你必须把虚弱的部分修剪掉。

name.original: A Rose By Any Other Name

description.original: Koshmarr rises again and I will crush any who try to take it.
description.display: 科什马尔再度崛起，我将粉碎任何试图抢夺它的人。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Elf Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Magic Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: A young Eladrin woman, raised to be the Queen of Koshmarr, what was meant to be an idyllic life took a dark turn on the night of her wedding. Pulled into the machinations of greater powers, she found herself in Mordent, now one of the many wandering ghosts. A person of great interest both to Azalin Rex and Strahd, she sought to negotiate her freedom from these dread domains. Her longtime companions and their newfound friends wanted the same and imbued her soul into Desmond's sword. As they traveled in search of returning her soul to her body, Voronika took matters into her own hands and used the crown of the Raven Queen to defeat Zybilna and cause the fall of Prismeer. This action drew the mists to Voronika and soon she discovered herself a new darklord in her domain of Koshmarr.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Voronika is an Evil Support Champion accomplishes her desire to become a darklord by empowering your highest damage dealing Champion.

event_upgrades.name: Calculating Guidance
event_upgrades.description: Voronika increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her.

event_upgrades.name: Search for the Crown
event_upgrades.description: Voronika has three quests to complete, she gets much stronger after she completes them.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为一名以科什马尔皇后为目标受教养长大的年轻雅灵女性，她原本应该过着诗情画意的生活，但在婚礼当晚，一切都发生了黑暗的转折。她被更为强大的力量卷入阴谋之中，并发现自己来到了莫登特，已变成无数的游荡鬼魂之一。作为亚扎林·雷克斯和斯特拉德都非常感兴趣的人，她曾试图通过谈判来离开这些恐惧领域。她的老朋友和她们新结识的朋友也有着同样的想法，并将她的灵魂注入了戴斯蒙德的剑中。在寻找灵魂回归身体之法的旅程中，沃罗妮卡逐渐掌控局势，并利用渡鸦女王的王冠击败了齐比尔娜，导致普利斯米尔陨落。这样的动静使迷雾向沃罗妮卡靠拢。不久之后，她发现自己成为了故乡科什马尔领域中新的黑暗领主。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 沃罗妮卡是一位邪恶的支援型勇士，她通过增强你伤害输出最高的勇士来实现她成为黑暗领主的野心。

event_upgrades.name: 计算引导
event_upgrades.description: 沃罗妮卡会提高她前列勇士的伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 寻找王冠
event_upgrades.description: 沃罗妮卡需要完成三个任务，完成后会变得更加强大。

original.name: Produce Flame
original.description: Voronika creates a flame in her hand which she fires at a random enemy.
original.long_description: Voronika creates a flame in her hand which she fires at a random enemy.

display.name: 制造火焰
display.description: 沃罗妮卡在手中制造一团火焰，并向一名随机敌人发射。
display.long_description: 沃罗妮卡在手中制造一团火焰，并向一名随机敌人发射。

original.name: Horrifying Visage
original.description: Voronika magically damages and pushes back all enemies. Survivors do reduced damage for 30 seconds.
original.long_description: Voronika moves in front of the party, magically damaging and pushing back all enemies. Any surviving enemies do reduced damage for 30 seconds.

display.name: 可怕面容
display.description: 沃罗妮卡运用魔法伤害并击退所有敌人。幸存者造成的伤害降低 30 秒。
display.long_description: 沃罗妮卡在队伍前方移动，运用魔法伤害并击退所有敌人。任何幸存的敌人造成的伤害降低 30 秒。

original.name: Calculating Guidance
original.tip_text: Voronika increases the damage of all Champions in the column in front of her.

display.name: 计算引导
display.tip_text: 沃罗妮卡会提高她前列所有勇士的伤害。

original.name: Search for the Crown
original.tip_text: Voronika has three quests to complete, and she becomes much stronger when they are complete.

display.name: 寻找王冠
display.tip_text: 沃罗妮卡需要完成三个任务，完成后会变得更加强大。

original.name: Embrace Evil
original.specialization_description: Voronika surrounds herself with powerful evil Champions to defeat her foes.

display.name: 拥抱邪恶
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡与强大的邪恶阵营勇士为伴，共同击败敌人。

original.name: Hunt The Favored
original.specialization_description: Voronika allies with powerful hunters to defeat favored foes.

display.name: 猎杀偏好者
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡与强大的猎人联手，击败偏好对手。

original.name: Weaken The Fools
original.specialization_description: Voronika uses Champions that sap the power of her foes to accomplish her quests.

display.name: 削弱愚钝者
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡利用削弱敌人力量的勇士，完成自己的任务。

original.name: Battle Magic
original.specialization_description: Voronika's puppet gains a Magic element to their attack for some explosive results.

display.name: 战斗魔法
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡获得魔法元素攻击，带来爆炸性效果。

original.name: Powerful Focus
original.specialization_description: Voronika's puppet gains more power from those supporting them and drives enemies back.

display.name: 强大专注
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡从支持者那里获得更多力量，击退敌人。

original.name: Strike First, Strike Hard
original.specialization_description: Voronika's puppet attacks faster and deals more damage while surrounded by allies.

display.name: 先发制人、重拳出击
display.specialization_description: 沃罗妮卡的傀儡在盟友的包围下攻击更快，伤害更高。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: If you think there is anything I wouldn't do for Koshmarr, reconsider.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 如果你认为我会对科什马尔有所保留，再仔细想想吧。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: I will lead Koshmarr to greatness. I must.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我将带领科什马尔走向伟大。我必须做到。

original.name: A Finger on the Scale
original.description: Perhaps you need a little...encouragement.

display.name: 天平上的手指
display.description: 也许你需要一点......激励

original.name: Shaped By My Will
original.description: My vision for the future includes you -- specifically, you obeying me.

display.name: 遵从我的意志
display.description: 我的未来愿景中包含你们--具体来说，就是你们服从我。

original.name: Strength of Will
original.description: I've taken a personal interest in your success.

display.name: 意志之力
display.description: 我个人对你的成功很感兴趣。

original.name: Keen Mind
original.description: Aren't you a clever one?

display.name: 敏锐思维
display.description: 你可真聪明？

original.name: Extended Support
original.description: My reach extends far beyond my domain's boundaries.

effects.description: Changes Calculating Guidance to target the next two columns.

display.name: 扩展支援
display.description: 我的能力范围远超我的领域界限。

effects.description: 使“计算引导”的目标改变为下两列。

original.name: Dark Lady
original.description: I have many plans for this.

display.name: 暗黑女王
display.description: 我对此有很多计划。

original.name: Unlimited Potential
original.description: This isn't even my final power level.

display.name: 无限潜力
display.description: 这根本不是我的最高力量等级。

original.name: Explorer of Nightmares
original.description: What do you dream of at night that truly scares you?

display.name: 梦魇探索者
display.description: 你晚上梦到什么会让你真正害怕？

original.name: Koshmarr's Embrace
original.description: Follow me, and you always have a home in Koshmarr.

display.name: 科什马尔之拥
display.description: 跟我来，你在科什马尔永远有一个家。

original.name: Dreamscape Walk
original.description: Time and distance work differently in dreams.

display.name: 梦境漫步
display.description: 在梦里，时间和距离都变得不一样。

original.name: Nightmarish Sprint
original.description: If you do not feel like running, I will give you something to run from.

display.name: 噩梦冲刺
display.description: 如果你不想跑，我就给你一个让你不得不跑的理由。

original.name: Calculated Movements
original.description: Nothing is left to chance - I control everything in Koshmarr.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Speed Run by $amount%, increases the reduction amount to 20%, and the effect amount starts reducing at 1 minute.

display.name: 精心计算的行动
display.description: 没什么是偶然的——我掌控着科什马尔里的一切。

effects.description: “速通”的基础效果增加 $amount%，效果递减比例提高到 20%，并且效果在 1 分钟后即开始递减。

original.name: Skilled Puppeteer
original.description: You have strings, and now you're mine.

display.name: 技艺精湛的傀儡师
display.description: 你身上扯着线，现在你是我的了。

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Do as I say - you'll live longer.

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 照我说的做 - 这样你就能活得久一些。

original.name: Master Puppeteer
original.description: The cute part is that you think you aren't already my puppet.

display.name: 傀儡师大师
display.description: 有意思的是，你居然以为自己还不是我的傀儡。

original.name: Kindred Allies
original.description: You are welcome in Koshmarr. For now.

effects.description: Adds Elves to Calculating Guidance's key allies.

display.name: 血族盟友
display.description: 科什马尔很欢迎你。至少暂时如此。

effects.description: 将精灵添加为“计算引导”的关键盟友。

display.name: 枯萎者德鲁伊沃罗妮卡
巴洛维亚拜访者沃罗妮卡

original.name: Old Friend's Calling Card
original.description: Van Richten may be a fearsome hunter, but he's also a kindly soul.

display.name: 老朋友的名片
display.description: 范·里希顿也许是个可怕的猎人，但他也是个善良的灵魂。

original.name: Van Richten's Reminder
original.description: Ah, for the time to sip tea with an old friend!

display.name: 范·里希顿的提醒
display.description: 啊，是时候和一位老朋友喝茶了！

original.name: The Courtesy of a Greater Host
original.description: Drink, Strahd. I already know why you're here.

display.name: 伟大主人的礼遇
display.description: 喝吧，斯特拉德。我已经知道你为什么来这里了。

original.name: Unassuming Reliquary
original.description: Dear Azalin, this was never meant to be yours.

display.name: 朴素的圣物箱
display.description: 亲爱的亚扎林，这本不该是你的。

original.name: Letter of Love
original.description: Desmond and I have known each other since we were children.

display.name: 情书
display.description: 戴斯蒙德和我从小就认识了。

original.name: Secret Promises
original.description: Marriage is an alliance of goals. But love is a splendid garden.

display.name: 秘密承诺
display.description: 婚姻是目标的联合。但爱情是一座美丽的花园。

original.name: Record of a Broken Heart
original.description: When Desmond fled the crown, he fled me as well. Securing Koshmarr is up to me.

display.name: 心碎记录
display.description: 戴斯蒙德逃离王室的时候，他也逃离了我。保护科什马尔的职责落到我的头上。

original.name: Failsafe Cocktail
original.description: I love him too well to let him be a problem. A little wolfsbane keeps the beast at bay.

display.name: 失败保险鸡尾酒
display.description: 我太爱他了，不会让他成为问题。一点点狼毒花就可以阻挡兽类。

original.name: Bridal Circlet
original.description: This wedding cements so many years of planning.

display.name: 新娘头环
display.description: 这场婚礼凝聚了多年的计划。

original.name: Wreath of Spring
original.description: After I wed Armand, I will be Queen of Koshmarr.

display.name: 春日花环
display.description: 嫁给阿曼德之后，我将成为科什马尔的皇后。

original.name: Ghost Tiara
original.description: Death is only an obstacle to be defeated when you are as determined as I am.

display.name: 幽灵头冠
display.description: 当你和我一样坚定不移的时候，死亡只是一个需要克服的障碍。

original.name: Darklord's Crown
original.description: Koshmarr will be secure under my rule. Forever.

display.name: 黑暗领主的王冠
display.description: 在我的统治下，科什马尔将安全无虞。永不改变。

original.name: Chair of Authority
original.description: One day, this will be mine.

display.name: 权威之椅
display.description: 总有一天，它将属于我。

original.name: Seat of Royalty
original.description: I'll hardly have time to sit down, as much as I do around here.

display.name: 皇室座椅
display.description: 需要做的事情太多，我几乎没有时间坐下来。

original.name: Queen's Throne
original.description: I will take Koshmarr in hand and make it what it's truly meant to be.

display.name: 女王宝座
display.description: 我将掌控科什马尔，并让它焕发真正的光彩。

original.name: Throne of the Dread Domain
original.description: I am Koshmarr.

display.name: 恐惧王国宝座
display.description: 我就是科什马尔。

original.name: Poisonous Blossoms
original.description: Wolfsbane in large doses causes instantaneous death.

display.name: 剧毒花朵
display.description: 大剂量的狼毒花可以瞬间致死。

original.name: Wolfsbane Cutting
original.description: Do you feel your fingers tingling? These delicate flowers are more than they seem.

display.name: 狼毒花枝
display.description: 你觉得手指刺痛吗？这些娇嫩的花可比看起来要厉害。

original.name: Belladonna Sprig
original.description: Every part of the deadly nightshade brims with poison.

display.name: 颠茄小枝
display.description: 这种致命的茄属植物每一部分都充满剧毒。

original.name: Deadly Oleander
original.description: Such lovely blooms, such bitter poison.

display.name: 致命夹竹桃
display.description: 花朵如此可爱，毒性如此强烈。

original.name: Delicate Bloom
original.description: This lovely rose is the symbol of our land.

display.name: 娇嫩花朵
display.description: 这朵漂亮的玫瑰是我们领地的象征。

original.name: Rose of Koshmarr
original.description: The fresh rose is delicate, but also thorny.

display.name: 科什马尔玫瑰
display.description: 新鲜的玫瑰非常娇艳，但也有刺。

original.name: Withered Blossom
original.description: Sometimes you must prune away what is weak.

display.name: 枯萎花朵
display.description: 有时你必须把虚弱的部分修剪掉。

original.name: A Rose By Any Other Name
original.description: Koshmarr rises again and I will crush any who try to take it.

display.name: 任意其他名字的玫瑰
display.description: 科什马尔再度崛起，我将粉碎任何试图抢夺它的人。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Elf Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位精灵勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Magic Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位魔法勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
